title: chore(text+frontend+packages): remove dead code, files, and dependencies
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the hive
gist.blurb: We just swept out nearly 3,000 lines of dead code, unused personas, and old dependencies. The codebase is feeling lighter and much easier to navigate.
gist.summary: Cleaned up the text, frontend, and package directories by removing 19 dead files and nearly 3,000 lines of unused code.
gist.impact: Developers will enjoy a cleaner, more maintainable codebase with fewer deprecated functions and unused dependencies.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee sweeping up old code, dead leaves, and dusty files into a dustpan. The Nomnom creature happily eating the pile of deprecated code snippets and old text files.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up dusty old code files and pixelated dead leaves. Nearby, the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of deprecated code snippets with a 'NOMNOM' speech bubble. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
